__prompts__.project_slug: URL/path-safe project identifier (auto-derived from the name)
__prompts__.project_description: One-line description used in pyproject.toml, package.json, README
__prompts__.python_package_name: Importable Python package name (underscores, no dashes)
__prompts__.author_email: Author email — baseline for the security disclosure address
__prompts__.year: Year stamped into LICENSE and copyright headers
__prompts__.license: License shipped with the rendered project

primary_language.__prompt__: Primary language path (drives which build files survive post-render pruning)
primary_language.polyglot: Both — keep Python and TypeScript build glue side by side

python_typechecker.__prompt__: Python type-checker — Astral `ty` is the 2026 default, `mypy` is the opt-in fallback
python_typechecker.mypy: mypy (mature, ships scientific-deps overrides commented out)

include_databricks.__prompt__: Reserve Databricks bundle scaffolding (lands in a later release)
include_databricks.yes: reserve placeholder for future Databricks scaffolding

include_codacy.__prompt__: Add Codacy quality analysis (.codacy.yml + CI job)
include_codacy.yes: include — adds .codacy.yml and the codacy CI job

include_codecov.__prompt__: Add Codecov coverage upload (codecov.yaml + CI upload job)
include_codecov.yes: include — adds codecov.yaml and the coverage upload job

include_snyk.__prompt__: Add Snyk vulnerability scan (.snyk + CI job)
include_snyk.yes: include — adds .snyk and the snyk CI job

include_sbom.__prompt__: Generate CycloneDX SBOM via scripts/generate-sbom.sh + CI job
include_sbom.yes: include — emits sbom-{python,node}.cdx.json on every release

include_macaron.__prompt__: Add Oracle Macaron supply-chain analysis job to supply-chain.yml
include_macaron.no: skip — supply-chain.yml without the Macaron job
include_macaron.yes: include — Macaron analysis runs on push (slower workflow)

include_devcontainer.no: skip — bring your own dev environment

include_docs_site.__prompt__: Add mkdocs.yml (Material) + docs.yml workflow that deploys to GitHub Pages
include_docs_site.no: skip — docs/ stays as plain markdown
include_docs_site.yes: include — MkDocs Material site auto-published from main

include_release_automation.__prompt__: Add Commitizen + release-please for automated Release PRs and tags
include_release_automation.yes: include — .cz.toml, release-please config, and release workflow

__prompts__.default_branch_name: Protected branch the runtime hook guards (typically `main`)
